concerns.analysis: The 'Compliance Requirements Matrix' table is visually broken because it is truncated. The source PDF table on page 3 contains 14 columns of data (CC and numbers 1 through 14, skipping 11). However, the rendered HTML table in the screenshot only displays the first 10 columns (CC through 9). The last four columns (10, 12, 13, and 14) and their associated data values (N, Y, Y, N respectively) are entirely missing from the visual output.
